repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 has no active ExactID entry; same-qid rejected angle0 already had a common-EIF corner theorem

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML plus ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO and ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: fixed-overlap orthogonal-score/common-EIF inference

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform angle0 rejected: spectral DML/LRO/ADML non-equivalence frontier for point/risk remainders, not studentized Wald gaps

published_prior_art.cite: Dorn2025WeakOverlapDRTStats and Rothe2017LimitedOverlapCI are closer weak-overlap t-statistic/CI comparators; neither gives a three-estimator DML/LRO/ADML S_n frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform angle0 rejected: primitive finite-support witness for DML-LRO-ADML risk separation

published_prior_art.cite: BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW gives linear-regression equivalences for augmented balancing/AutoDML, not this weak-overlap witness

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The fixed-overlap common-EIF collapse is a known sanity anchor from DML/LRO/ADML orthogonal-score theory, not a novel theorem.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal misses closer weak-overlap inference papers: Dorn 2025 on doubly robust t-statistics, Rothe 2017 on robust CIs under limited overlap, Armstrong-Kolesar 2021 on ATE inference when t-inference can fail, and Heiler-Kazak 2021 on many extreme propensity scores.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem invokes equality of h_D,h_L,h_A but assumes only Assumptions 1--3, while the variance-estimator expansion that makes h_m relevant is Assumption 5.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption 5 writes the variance expansion with a free h_m(W_i) term rather than a defined empirical average, deterministic local drift, or limiting process.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The LRO comparator is not locked to a concrete ATE moment/Jacobian/sandwich normalization, so V_L and h_L are not uniquely defined.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary 1
soundness_flags.one_line: When h_D=h_L=h_A, S_n=0 and lambda_min^+(S_n) has no positive eigenvalue; the stated reduction to Conjecture 1 needs an explicit zero-kernel convention.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Dorn 2025, Rothe 2017, Armstrong-Kolesar 2021, and Heiler-Kazak 2021 to Related work and explain why their weak-overlap CI/t-statistic results do not subsume the three-estimator S_n frontier.
Define the exact LRO ATE moment, Jacobian, sandwich variance, and residual channel h_L in the locked parameters, not only in §11 as a future specialization.
Rewrite Assumption 5 as a mathematically precise stochastic expansion with either empirical averages, local deterministic perturbations, or a named Gaussian limit for the h_m channels.
Add a zero-kernel convention for lambda_min^+(S_n), or split the fixed-overlap/equal-channel reduction outside Conjecture 1 so §9 algebra is literally valid.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal by pinning the LRO/studentization objects and adding the missed weak-overlap inference literature before Stage 0.
